function.name: predict_illness
function.description: Predicts possible illnesses based on user's symptoms. Use this when the user has described multiple symptoms and you need to provide a medical prediction. Always gather at least 2-3 symptoms before calling this function.

symptoms.description: Comma-separated list of symptoms the user has described. Include severity and duration if mentioned. Example: 'severe headache for 2 days, high fever, nausea, sensitivity to light'

language.description: Language code for the response. Use the same language the user is speaking.

urgency.description: Urgency level based on symptoms described
